case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1514 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 18.11.2025 M/s Achar Khan Gabol and Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocates for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Ihsanullah Laghari, Focal Person (Judicial) College Education Department >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioners being civil servants will avail the alternate remedy, hence under instructions does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed; leaving the petitioners at liberty to avail the alternate remedy in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
